common.name: Name
catalog.title: Card Catalog
catalog.totalCountTruncated: {0} of {1} cards (showing first {2} — refine the filter)
detail.openOnSiteHint: Opens this card on the TEAONLINE site in your default browser. Important: pick the MOD on the site first — the choice is saved in the browser and the redirect lands on the right filter.
detail.back.title: Back to previous card
detail.fusionsNoneAsResult: No registered fusion produces this card.
detail.fusionsNoneAsResultFiltered: No "produces this card" fusion matches the filter.
detail.fusionsNoneAsMaterial: This card doesn't appear as material in any fusion.
detail.dropsNone: No duelist drops this card on the mapped pools (or this MOD's drop offsets weren't detected).
duelists.title: Duelists
duelists.intro: List of opponents in the active MOD. Click to see deck and drops by battle rank.
duelists.noMod: No MOD loaded. Go to MODs and activate one first.
duelists.empty: No duelist in the active MOD's JSON.
duelists.col.name: Name
duelists.col.deckCardsTooltip: Number of distinct cards in the deck
home.deck.empty: Add cards by scanning the emulator (above) or clicking on cards in the catalog below.
memCard.sort.label: Sort
memCard.display.label: Display
settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: PREFERENCES
settings.maxCardsHelp: Default: {0}. Limits the first batch shown in the grid.
settings.imageSourceFullDesc: Where to fetch the artwork shown in catalogs, fusions, equips and details.
settings.shortcutHelpRecording: Press the combo or a gamepad button...
settings.shortcutHelp: Supports keyboard (e.g. Ctrl+F2) and gamepad (e.g. Pad:A). Click Register.
settings.colorsDesc: Palette used in |N| markers of the card description. Index 0 is the default text; the rest are editable.
settings.claude.title: Auto translation (Claude)
settings.claude.desc: When configured, translates card descriptions to every supported language during MOD registration. The original English description stays intact.
settings.claude.apiKeyHelp: Get one at console.anthropic.com → API Keys. Stored locally; only sent to Anthropic.
settings.claude.baseUrlHelp: Only change if using a proxy or Bedrock/Vertex.
settings.claude.autoTranslate: Translate descriptions when registering a MOD
settings.ollama.modelHelp: Model tag (e.g. llama3.1:8b). Pull via 'ollama pull'.
settings.lmstudio.title: LM Studio (local, free)
settings.lmstudio.apiKeyHelp: Only if the server requires Bearer auth.
settings.deepl.apiKeyHelp: Get one at deepl.com/account. Free plan: 500k chars/month.
settings.imageSourceDesc: Where to fetch card art from.
settings.imageSourceTeaDesc: HD images from the website (requires internet)
settings.modeMod.alert: Card art is the same the game shows when you press Triangle (102×96 px), extracted directly from the ROM. When zoomed in, it will appear pixelated. Reload the ROM if you switch mods.
favorites.title: Favorites
favorites.subtitle: LISTS
favorites.empty: No lists yet. Create one to organize your favorite cards.
favorites.noActiveMod: Pick an active MOD on the MODs screen before creating lists. Lists are exclusive to the active MOD, since each MOD has cards with its own IDs.
favorites.deleteListConfirm: Delete list "{0}"? This cannot be undone.
favorites.list.empty: This list is empty. Add cards using the button above.
favorites.picker.title: Add cards to list
imageSource.changedToMod: Images now come from the ROM (offline). Reload the ROM if you haven't.
mods.title: Manage MODs
mods.subtitle: CONFIGURATION
mods.searchHelp: Start typing to filter available MODs.
mods.empty: No MODs registered yet. Use the form on the side.
mods.noImageUrl: ⚠ No image URL — re-register to use.
mods.activated: MOD '{0}' set as active. Other screens will use this MOD.
mods.deleteConfirm: Remove MOD '{0}' and all its files?
mods.extraDuelistHelp: Check if the MOD adds a 40th duelist at the start of the list.
mods.fieldSource.title: Source per field (ROM or JSON)
mods.fieldSource.help: Suggested default: JSON for everything (the lab is usually more complete). Switch a row to ROM where the MOD binary is more correct. Limited / Password / Star Chip cost only exist in JSON — picking ROM leaves them empty.
activeMod.label: ACTIVE MOD
